classes.reasoning: This document is explicitly titled 'PARTICIPANT INFORMATION SHEET AND INFORMED CONSENT FORM' with signature blocks for participant, study partner, and investigator, and contains consent language ('I agree to take part').

summary: This is an informed consent form for study BIORCE-NEU-2022-004, testing BRC-209 (Velagostat) in participants with early Alzheimer's disease. The document explains that participants will be randomly assigned (2:1 ratio) to receive either BRC-209 or placebo for up to 96 weeks, with the goal of slowing memory and thinking problems by preventing tau protein buildup in brain cells.
